name: NEXTERA ENERGY INC
summary: NextEra Energy Inc (NEE) is an energy company engaged in the generation, transmission, distribution, and sale of electric energy. It operates through subsidiaries including Florida Power & Light Company, a regulated electric utility, and NextEra Energy Resources, which develops and operates clean energy projects including wind, solar, and battery storage across North America.
